text.title: Live Ticket Drafting (Shared-Screen Pattern) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for live-ticket-drafting-shared-screen-pattern.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the applies_if conditions hold AND no skip_if matches for this engagement?

example.trace: Engagement passes applies_if, none of skip_if match. Observable check shows the first non-skip rule's signal is true → conclusion routes to that rule id → agent draft enforces the rule and attaches matching evidence.
